import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a new Invoice"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/invoice/v1/invoice/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a new Invoice
### Permissions

| Auth Method | Required Permissions |
|---|---|
| [API Key](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#api-key-auth) | All permissions (admin access) |
| [Basic Auth](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#basic-auth) | `Can add payment requests` or `Can add e-commerce payments` + `Can add Invoice` |

> **Gateway permission**: `Can use pg_code` for the target [payment gateway](/developers/payments/payment-methods/)


<span style={{display:"none"}}>{"curl --location 'https://ksa.ottu.dev/b/invoice/v1/invoice/' \\\n--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n--header 'Accept: application/json' \\\n--header 'Authorization: Api-Key YOUR_API_KEY' \\\n--data '{\n  \"type\": \"payment_request\",\n  \"invoice_number\": \"INV-001\",\n  \"due_date\": \"2030-12-31\",\n  \"currency_code\": \"KWD\",\n  \"pg_codes\": [\n    \"knet\"\n  ],\n  \"invoice_items\": [\n    {\n      \"sku\": \"ITEM-001\",\n      \"description\": \"Product description\",\n      \"unit_price\": \"10.000\",\n      \"quantity\": \"1\"\n    }\n  ]\n}'"}</span>

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
